name: spec-drive
description: Spec-driven development: idea -> research -> requirements -> design -> tasks -> autonomous execution with quality gates.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Create a new spec-driven project with idea.md and start research

commands.name: research
commands.description: Run or re-run the research phase for the active spec project

commands.name: requirements
commands.description: Generate structured requirements from research for the active spec project

commands.name: design
commands.description: Generate technical design from requirements for the active spec project

commands.name: tasks-cmd
commands.description: Generate implementation task list from design for the active spec project

commands.name: implement
commands.description: Start or resume autonomous task execution loop for the active spec project

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show current phase, task progress, and recent activity for the active spec project

commands.name: cancel
commands.description: Cancel and optionally remove the active spec project

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all spec-drive projects with status and last-activity

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show help for spec-drive commands and workflow

commands.name: switch
commands.description: Switch the active spec-drive project and write ~/.spec-drive-active.json
